display_name: o3 provides state-of-the-art intelligence on a variety of tasks and domains, including science, math, and coding. This bot uses medium reasoning effort by default but low, medium & high are also selec
description:
o3 provides state-of-the-art intelligence on a variety of tasks and domains, including science, math, and coding. This bot uses medium reasoning effort by default but low, medium & high are also selectable; supports 200k tokens of input context and 100k tokens of output context.

Optional parameters:
Set reasoning effort: Select from `low`, `medium`, `high`. Medium reasoning effort is set by default.
